headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .182 / .357 / .364.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Minnesota Twins, KC 3, MIN 2. Carter Jensen led the night, 1-4 | HR, K, 2 RBI in the latest Royals game. Carter Jensen supplied the loudest Royals contact at 109.8 mph.

player_of_game.name: Carter Jensen
player_of_game.reason: 1-4 | HR, K, 2 RBI in the latest Royals game.
